asset_name: Star Wars B2 Super Battle Droid Low Poly
author: Droid Assets Collection
usage_notes: Low-poly B2 Super Battle Droid - heavier variant of B1 droid. Stocky metallic frame with integrated weaponry. Suitable for heavy infantry or elite CIS unit class. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Stockier frame than B1 - clearly heavier/stronger unit class
Integrated arms with built-in weaponry - visually distinct from B1
Metallic gray/tan color palette matches Separatist forces
Appropriate for elite droid or heavy unit tier
Low polycount suitable for infantry unit class
No skeleton rig - static mesh suitable for unit placement

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_b2_super_droid_sketchfab_001

asset_manifest.json.description: This file - metadata and provenance record

discovery_notes: Discovered via Sketchfab search: 'B2 super droid Star Wars low poly'
Score: 8.8/10 - Good heavy unit silhouette, appropriate polycount, CC-BY license
Complements B1 droid for faction unit variety
